name: yupee-dialogs
description: This is simple inner dialogs for the yuppe framework, it can be used for electron

scripts.build:copy: cp src/yupee-inner-dialogs.js dist && cp src/yupee-native-dialogs.js dist
scripts.build:minify: terser src/yupee-inner-dialogs.js -o dist/yupee-inner-dialogs.min.js && terser dist/yupee-inner-dialogs.mjs -o dist/yupee-inner-dialogs.min.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:copy && npm run build:esm && npm run build:minify
